name: testStatusRequestServer
description: Verify the status is sent to the server
descriptionHtml: Verify the status is sent to the server

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify the status is sent to the server

steps.name: Select '0626.110107 test request company' company using filter
Select '0626.110107 test request merchant' business unit using filter
Verify: status is sent to the server
